description: Published reference data for the wetSpring science pipeline — every value traceable from paper to code

gonzales_2014.title: Oclacitinib (APOQUEL) is a novel Janus kinase inhibitor with activity against cytokines involved in allergy

table_1.description: IC50 values for oclacitinib inhibition of cytokine-dependent signaling pathways
table_1.ordering: JAK1 < IL-2 < IL-31 < IL-6 < IL-4 < IL-13

python_baseline.description: ChEMBL JAK panel retrieval and IC50 comparison
python_baseline.output_hash_note: BLAKE3 of canonical JSON (science fields only, sorted keys, excludes _provenance metadata)

chembl.reference_artifact_note: Reference snapshot — NOT a runtime fallback. NestGate fetches live via fetch_external.
chembl.match_note: ChEMBL assays CHEMBL4481924/CHEMBL5245505 report 10.0 nM, matching Gonzales 2014 Table 1

pubchem.reference_artifact_note: Reference snapshot — NOT a runtime fallback. NestGate fetches live via fetch_external.

fleck_gonzales_2021.title: Pharmacokinetics of lokivetmab (Cytopoint) in healthy dogs

gonzales_2013.title: Interleukin-31: its role in canine pruritus and naturally occurring canine atopic dermatitis

serum_il31.description: Serum IL-31 levels in atopic vs healthy dogs

values.note: Elevated IL-31 correlates with pruritus severity

validation_chain.description: Paper → Rust → NUCLEUS primal composition. Pure Rust pipeline — only data is not Rust. No fallbacks in springs.
validation_chain.philosophy: Springs are science consumers. All infrastructure is primal composition. Missing primals produce gap reports for primalSpring.

stages.name: public_data_ingestion
stages.description: ChEMBL/PubChem data fetched via NestGate (TLS) and cached content-addressed
stages.artifact: BLAKE3 hash of fetched payload, NestGate cache key
stages.routing: biomeOS → NestGate (no fallbacks — gap report if unavailable)
stages.gap_action: hand to primalSpring → primals evolve fetch_external capability

stages.name: rust_validation
stages.description: Rust binary validating computations match published values

stages.name: nucleus_composition
stages.description: Live NUCLEUS deployment with provenance trio wrapping
stages.gap_action: hand to primalSpring → primals teams evolve missing components

python_cross_reference.description: healthSpring Python baseline exists as historical cross-reference only — not in the live pipeline
python_cross_reference.note: Pure Rust pipeline: even downloads route through Tower + Nest atomics

reference_data_on_disk.description: ChEMBL/PubChem JSON files in barracuda/data/chembl/ are reference artifacts, not runtime fallbacks
reference_data_on_disk.note: These document what the external APIs return for oclacitinib. They are NOT loaded by wetSpring handlers — NestGate caches this data via fetch_external.
